sections.markdown:
- Activity: Run
- Started: 2025-07-13 09:39
- Distance: 21.3 km
- Moving time: 2:00:01
- Elapsed time: 2:00:04
- Elevation gain: 161.2 m
- Average heart rate: 165.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 181 bpm
- Average watts: 218.4 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `8` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.6 bpm`, ranging from `150.0` to `177.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `159.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.6 bpm` (+14.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.0 spm`, with a working range of `138.2` to `180.8 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `172.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `174.5 spm` (+2.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:39 /km` across `21.260 km` in `2:00:01` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:45 /km` and second-half pace was `5:32 /km` (-13 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.2 bpm` average and `181 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.9 bpm` in the first half and `171.7 bpm` in the second (+12.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `2:00:01` out of `2:00:04` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `212.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.6 m` and `16.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `111.0 m` in the first half and `101.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
